_comment: Scoped to core/resilience — the reliability primitives this project's own docs call 'the moat' — not the 46 provider adapters. Those are thin, largely-mechanical HTTP-mapping code already covered by the per-provider contract-test suite (npm run test:contracts); mutating them would cost hours of CI time for low signal. Run locally with `npm run test:mutation`; not wired into CI yet — see README note before enabling as a gate.
